description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a rugged, angular frame with exposed metal supports and a reinforced roll cage, designed for durability and safety in challenging environments. The body is primarily dark green with metallic accents, and the vehicle is equipped with large, knobby tires suitable for off-road use. The rear houses a prominent engine assembly with visible exhaust pipes and an air intake, suggesting high performance and power. The interior includes two brown seats and a steering wheel, with minimalistic dashboard controls visible through the large, sloped windshield. Additional features include a set of front-mounted auxiliary lights and protective side panels. The overall design emphasizes functionality, protection, and adaptability for urban and off-road scenarios.
description: A rugged, dark green all-terrain vehicle with a reinforced roll cage, large off-road tires, and a powerful rear engine assembly. It features exposed metal supports, two brown seats, and prominent front auxiliary lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide stance, protective front bumper, and the exposed engine components flanked by large tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, brown seats, and the detailed rear engine assembly with exhaust and air intake.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent engine, exhaust system, and the vehicle's robust roll cage structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the cabin, roll cage, and rear engine components.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and pronounced blocks, optimized for traction on both urban and off-road surfaces.
